questions.explanation: CPU stands for Central Processing Unit. It is the brain of the computer that performs all calculations and operations.

questions.q: Which planet is known as the Red Planet?
questions.explanation: Mars is known as the Red Planet because of its reddish appearance, which is due to iron oxide (rust) on its surface.

questions.q: What is the capital of Pakistan?
questions.explanation: Islamabad is the capital city of Pakistan. It was built in the 1960s to replace Karachi as the capital.

questions.q: Who is known as the Father of the Nation in Pakistan?
questions.urdu: پاکستان میں قوم کے باپ کے طور پر کون جانا جاتا ہے؟
questions.explanation: Quaid-e-Azam Muhammad Ali Jinnah is known as the Father of the Nation. He founded Pakistan in 1947.

questions.q: What is the largest ocean on Earth?
questions.explanation: The Pacific Ocean is the largest ocean on Earth, covering more than 63 million square miles.
